![James Sinclair presenting to startup founders](https://www.founderfriend.io/images/hero-jds.png)
StartUp Coach. Founder Consultant.
# Transform YourStartUp Vision Into Reality
I am a trusted startup consultant and founder coach to first-time founders, technical builders, corporate execs, and academic leaders stepping into entrepreneurship. Seed to Series A.
Strategic guidance for ambitious founders. From concept to scale, helping founders navigate complexity and accelerate everything.
Book Your Intro Call[How It Works](https://www.founderfriend.io/startup-consulting/how-it-works)
Trusted by founders from
YC
Techstars
Boeing
Microsoft
Uber
Google
Shopify
![Starting A StartUp Book Cover - Build A Product People Want](https://www.founderfriend.io/images/book/Starting_a_Startup_3D.png)
![#1 New Release on Amazon](https://www.founderfriend.io/images/book/amazon-new-release-badge.png)
5.0
## New Release: Starting A StartUp
90% of startups fail because founders build products nobody wants.
Not you.
Starting A StartUp isn't theory. It's a battle-tested framework for founders who want results. Fastest team to learn, wins. Not the smartest. Not the richest. Just the team that executes faster than everyone else.
This book takes you from zero to paying customers without wasting time, money, or sanity. Real tactics. No fluff. No excuses.
[![Buy now on Amazon](https://www.founderfriend.io/images/book/amazon.png)](https://www.amazon.com/Starting-StartUp-Build-Something-People/dp/1774586398/?maas=maas_adg_BA6B46F629FCCFF7BE569D18C9E245AD_afap_abs&ref_=aa_maas&tag=maas)
## Who I Work With
I work with founders as a startup coach, founder consultant, and trusted startup advisor—helping them move from idea to traction, with clarity, speed, and systems. From technical builders to venture-backed teams, I help startups scale without the fluff.
I work with founders at different stages and backgrounds. Each brings unique strengths and faces distinct challenges.
### First-Time Founders
### First-Time Founders
You've never done this before. That means you're not carrying bad habits. You're starting with clarity. Let's build something strong from day one.
[Learn More ](https://www.founderfriend.io/founder-types/for-first-time-founders)
### Technical Builders
### Technical Builders
You're technical. You've shipped code. Now it's time to ship a business that scales.
[Learn More ](https://www.founderfriend.io/founder-types/for-technical-founders)
### Corporate Execs
### Corporate Execs
You've run orgs and P&Ls. You see a problem. Let's go solve it your way.
[Learn More ](https://www.founderfriend.io/founder-types/for-corporate-execs)
### Academic Founders
### Academic Founders
You're coming out of research and into reality. We'll translate your work into a market-ready business.
[Learn More ](https://www.founderfriend.io/founder-types/for-academic-founders)
### Practicing MDs
### Practicing MDs
You've led in medicine. Now you're building something bigger. Let's shape the system around your insight.
[Learn More ](https://www.founderfriend.io/founder-types/for-md-founders)
### VC Portfolio Companies
### VC Portfolio Companies
Your backers want results. Let's make the next round inevitable.
[Learn More ](https://www.founderfriend.io/founder-types/for-vc-backed-founders)
### Bootstrapped Builders
### Bootstrapped Builders
You're funding this yourself. Every bet matters. Let's make them count.
[Learn More ](https://www.founderfriend.io/founder-types/for-bootstrapped-builders)
## Where Are You Right Now?
Every startup moves through predictable stages. Each stage has its own challenges, opportunities, and next moves.
### Pre-Idea
You've been circling this for a while. Notes in your phone. Domain half-bought. Maybe even spoke to a dev or two. Sometimes, you're just here for a sanity check. Other times, because no matter how many times you put it down, the idea won't leave you alone.
[Learn More ](https://www.founderfriend.io/startup-stages/pre-idea)
### MVP
You're building. It's ugly. It barely works. But it's real. You're showing it to people. Getting feedback. Maybe even charging. But it's all duct tape and dreams right now.
[Learn More ](https://www.founderfriend.io/startup-stages/mvp)
### First Customer
Someone paid you. Now what? You're figuring out how to do it again. And again. And again. You're learning what works. What doesn't. What you need to change.
[Learn More ](https://www.founderfriend.io/startup-stages/first-customer)
### Some Traction
You have users. Revenue. Fans. But it's all duct tape. You're hiring. Growing. Learning. And trying to keep it all together while you figure out what's next.
[Learn More ](https://www.founderfriend.io/startup-stages/some-traction)
### Early Scale
This might actually be a company. You're in rooms you used to dream about. You're Googling acronyms during board calls. You're building systems. Processes. Teams.
[Learn More ](https://www.founderfriend.io/startup-stages/early-scale)
### Ready to Get Started?
Book your intro with a startup advisor who's helped 1500+ founders go faster.
Let's see if we're a good fit. One call. No commitment. Just clarity.
Book Your Intro Call
### One Job on That Call:
We figure out your North Star.
Clarity on your ultimate destination and why it matters.
We sketch the broad steps to get there.
A high-level roadmap that makes sense for your situation.
Then we throw that map out the window.
And work out what you have to do right now to even have a shot.
Mapped with just the right amount of chaos.
## I'm Not Your Mentor. I'm Your Multiplier.
You own the vision. I help you shape the system around it so it can scale, survive, and thrive.
I don't teach theory. I help you execute.
I don't give advice. I help you build momentum.
I don't sell frameworks. I help you find clarity in chaos.
I don't just talk strategy. I help you make it real.
![James Sinclair co-building with founders](https://www.founderfriend.io/images/JDS-whiteboard.webp)
James Sinclair
## How This Starts
Simple. Direct. No games. We figure out if we should work together.
1
### It starts with a call.
One session. No commitment. We spar, explore, sketch, and see if there's signal.
2
### We see how we think together.
There's no economic intent. Nothing to sell. You can't hire me off one call, and I wouldn't let you. This is a working session to explore your context, pressure test ideas, and decide if we even want to keep going. It has to feel right, for both of us.
3
### You walk away sharper.
Even if we never speak again, the goal is you leave clearer than you came in.
[Learn More ](https://www.founderfriend.io/startup-consulting/how-it-works)
## Your Coach: James Sinclair
James has a track record of success in innovation, entrepreneurship, and startup consulting. He has successfully coached founders in top accelerators such as Y Combinator, TechStars, and Capital Factory, as well as founders at major tech giants like Uber, Airbnb, Shopify, and Google.
With several exits of his own companies to industry leaders such as Boeing and Microsoft, James is highly regarded in the startup community as a founders founder.
> Crazy good at understanding and getting to value out the gate. Exactly who I need in my corner."

# Accounting & Advisory   
When Your Growth Demands It.
We understand that you want to grow your business and reduce your risks.   
That’s why we offer solutions that can help you achieve your goals and meet your compliance needs.
## Why Choose Centri?
At Centri, we leverage our experience in accounting, finance, and management   
with our knowledge of capital markets to give your business guidance when it matters most.   
Tailored to you, we provide accounting and advisory services designed for any stage of the business lifecycle.
[See Why We Can Help You Succeed](https://centriconsulting.com/one-firm/)

# Investment Consulting Tailored for the Institutional Investor
[Find Out More ](https://www.segalmarco.com/investment-consulting)
The global investment landscape is increasingly complex. Institutional investors need the guidance of an experienced consultant with proprietary research and cutting-edge tools to produce optimal results.
Work with us.
## Who we are
Segal Marco Advisors is one of the largest U.S.-based investment consulting firms, with combined discretionary and advisory assets exceeding $600 billion.
For more than 55 years, we’ve been advising organizations on investment strategy.
[Our History ](https://www.segalmarco.com/about-us/our-story)
![Investor Giving Advice To His Clients.](https://www.segalmarco.com/media/2534/investor-giving-advice-to-his-clients.jpg?anchor=center&mode=crop&width=900&height=600&rnd=134182266030000000) ![Investor Giving Advice To His Clients.](https://www.segalmarco.com/media/2534/investor-giving-advice-to-his-clients.jpg?anchor=center&mode=crop&width=700&height=350&rnd=134182266030000000)
### We’re one of the largest U.S.-based investment consultants.
![Financial Consultation In Progress With Advisors](https://www.segalmarco.com/media/2535/financial-consultation-in-progress-with-advisors.jpg?anchor=center&mode=crop&width=900&height=600&rnd=134182266460000000) ![Financial Consultation In Progress With Advisors](https://www.segalmarco.com/media/2535/financial-consultation-in-progress-with-advisors.jpg?anchor=center&mode=crop&width=700&height=350&rnd=134182266460000000)
## Independent advice you can count on
We’re proud to be an independent, employee-owned firm, which enables us to provide objective, high-quality advice.
Our senior professionals average more than 25 years of experience and have invested through all types of market conditions. They’ll draw on their expertise and Segal Marco’s research and technology to help your organization craft a comprehensive strategy or review and refine your existing one — and then execute it to help your organization achieve its investment objectives.
[Find Out More ](https://www.segalmarco.com/investment-consulting)
## Research to help you make informed decisions
Find clarity in today’s markets with our proprietary research. You’ll have access to thought leadership and analysis to help your decision-making.
[Learn About Our Research ](https://www.segalmarco.com/investment-research)
![Business Colleagues Analyzing The Market On A Screen](https://www.segalmarco.com/media/2536/business-colleagues-analyzing-the-market-on-a-screen.jpg?anchor=center&mode=crop&width=900&height=600&rnd=134182266780000000) ![Business Colleagues Analyzing The Market On A Screen](https://www.segalmarco.com/media/2536/business-colleagues-analyzing-the-market-on-a-screen.jpg?anchor=center&mode=crop&width=700&height=350&rnd=134182266780000000)
![A Female Investor Actively Listening To Her Business Client](https://www.segalmarco.com/media/2537/a-female-investor-actively-listening-to-her-business-client.jpg?center=0.41216216216216217,0.58912386706948638&mode=crop&width=900&height=600&rnd=134182268050000000) ![A Female Investor Actively Listening To Her Business Client](https://www.segalmarco.com/media/2537/a-female-investor-actively-listening-to-her-business-client.jpg?center=0.41216216216216217,0.58912386706948638&mode=crop&width=700&height=350&rnd=134182268050000000)
## A team that understands your challenges
You want to work with someone who has a proven track record of success in your industry. With our deep bench of investment consultants, we have the experience you seek. From Taft-Hartley plans and non-profits to Fortune 500 companies, we’ve got you covered.
[See Who We Help ](https://www.segalmarco.com/investment-industries)
## You can delegate decision-making about investing to us
We offer discretionary investment management so your team can concentrate on what you do best without having to worry about staying on top of the ever-evolving investment industry. As your outsourced chief investment officer (OCIO), we’ll take care of your portfolio.
![Investment Colleagues Discussing Over Market Report](https://www.segalmarco.com/media/2526/investment-colleagues-discussing-over-market-report.jpg?anchor=center&mode=crop&width=900&height=600&rnd=134171379150000000) ![Investment Colleagues Discussing Over Market Report](https://www.segalmarco.com/media/2526/investment-colleagues-discussing-over-market-report.jpg?anchor=center&mode=crop&width=700&height=350&rnd=134171379150000000)
![Mid Adult Businesswoman Presenting Ideas To Investment Team](https://www.segalmarco.com/media/2525/mid-adult-businesswoman-presenting-ideas-to-investment-team.jpg?anchor=center&mode=crop&width=900&height=600&rnd=134171378870000000) ![Mid Adult Businesswoman Presenting Ideas To Investment Team](https://www.segalmarco.com/media/2525/mid-adult-businesswoman-presenting-ideas-to-investment-team.jpg?anchor=center&mode=crop&width=700&height=350&rnd=134171378870000000)
## We can take care of proxy voting on your behalf
Proxy voting is one of our corporate governance services.
Each year, thousands of companies trust us to vote their proxies. Let us vote for your organization, guided by your proxy voting policy.
[Corporate Governance Services ](https://www.segalmarco.com/corporate-governance)

# The fastest way to finance software and hardware
Choose Capchase as your financing partner to close deals faster and increase your earnings. Approve your buyer, configure your offer, and win your deal in minutes.
[Book a call](https://www.capchase.com/demo)
Trusted by over 10,000 vendors & buyers
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6146543ab50f167ae088b201/68c2bfd6294531eb547b806e_gradient-1.webp)
### Buyers expect payment options
82% of U.S. companies use financing for equipment and software. If you don’t offer it, you risk losing the deal.
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6146543ab50f167ae088b201/68c2c0d038469984e1c349d7_image-2.webp)
### Financing is often the roadblock
Clunky, slow, and unreliable processes stall sales. Done right, financing accelerates deals and keeps you in control.
### Capchase makes financing easier
Close high-velocity or high-complexity transactions in minutes, not weeks. Reseller partner approved.
## Experience the Capchase advantage
Embedded vendor financing that delivers faster approvals, easy deal configurations, and real-time deal status–right where you work.
For Sales
### Close more deals at a higher value
Use flexible payment options as a competitive advantage. Whether your customer prefers monthly, quarterly, or extended net terms - give them the choice they want.
[Learn more](https://www.capchase.com/department/sales)
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6146543ab50f167ae088b201/68cc2f18bce12671fa026ec0_laptop-new.webp)
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6146543ab50f167ae088b201/67b486ac339ddec78540d46d_Card-neww.png)
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6146543ab50f167ae088b201/67adf0f761a0d053b55105ad_Finance-1.webp)
For Finance
### Get paid upfront without slowing sales
Offer payment flexibility while still getting paid upfront on every deal—including multi-year and reseller deals—eliminating billing headaches and putting an end to chasing payments.
[Learn more](https://www.capchase.com/department/finance)
## Win-win for your business, partners, and customers
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6146543ab50f167ae088b201/68c2da91024544ae491cae81_webp.webp)
### Vendors & Manufacturers
Get paid upfront, empower customers with flexible payments, and leave the collections burden to us. Partner channel approved.
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6146543ab50f167ae088b201/68c2dabce8165ab45ce7b7dd_layout.webp)
### Reseller Partners
Cut closing from weeks to minutes with easy financing, seamless checkout, and faster payouts.
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6146543ab50f167ae088b201/68c2daef4a17b8835cbdcbc1_buyer.webp)
### Buyers
Allow your customers to optimize their cash flow while still purchasing the tech they need to be successful.
## Everything you need to simplify B2B financing
Use Capchase from within your sales team's daily tools. Create a white-labeled captive financing program. Enjoy a faster, more responsive, and better experience.  

[Learn more](https://www.capchase.com/features)
### Easy deal configuration  

Generate payment options to best fit your deal including term length, payment frequency, net terms, and subsidy—calculating pricing in real-time.
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6146543ab50f167ae088b201/679b7b12129d16826d688902_PL-visual.svg)
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6146543ab50f167ae088b201/679b7bc368ed600e8a5ded7f_Vendor-PL.svg)
### Instant buyer qualification
Approve your customers in advance—in just minutes not weeks—so you can offer financing confidently.
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6146543ab50f167ae088b201/68cc1631ae0cd168e0f2e1d5_ui.png)![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6146543ab50f167ae088b201/68cc1631ae0cd168e0f2e1d5_ui.png)
### Captive financing program  

Extending your brand throughout the payments experience, powered and funded by Capchase.
### Embedded in your sales tools
Work directly in Salesforce CRM, receive immediate updates in Slack or Teams, track your buyer’s order completion live.
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6146543ab50f167ae088b201/679b817a692182130c28f0d8_salseforce.svg)

## Intelligent transformation.
We empower our clients to harness the transformative power of AI by enabling smarter decision-making, automating complex processes, personalizing customer experiences, driving innovation, and securing competitive advantages.
[Learn more](https://ankura.com/solutions/ankura-ai)
![](https://ankura.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fstorage.googleapis.com%2Fankura-dev-user-uploads%2F2021%2F11%2F9c6a1189-home-hero-conflict.jpg&w=3840&q=75)
## The right experts at the right time.
Our team of cross-industry, cross-disciplinary experts are trusted advisors who partner with our clients – listening, learning, and charting the next steps that Protect, Create, and Recover Value through challenging times or events.
[Learn more](https://ankura.com/focus-areas/conflict)
![](https://ankura.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fstorage.googleapis.com%2Fankura-dev-user-uploads%2F2021%2F11%2F8edb1760-home-hero-distress.jpg&w=3840&q=75)
## Critical expertise in crisis situations.
Disruption is the new normal and change will continue to accelerate at a dramatic pace. Our global team delivers the strategies and solutions that keep our clients ahead. Where others advise, we solve. Where others consult, we partner.
[Learn more](https://ankura.com/focus-areas/distress)
![](https://ankura.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fstorage.googleapis.com%2Fankura-dev-user-uploads%2F2021%2F12%2F5e589e9e-home-hero-performance.jpg&w=3840&q=75)
## For the opportunity. For the future.
We are a firm of experts and advisors uniquely built to tackle each challenge or need, and we effectively combine the right expertise into solutions, services, and results. We don’t just talk about bringing the best together; we do it.
[Learn more](https://ankura.com/focus-areas/performance)
![](https://ankura.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fstorage.googleapis.com%2Fankura-dev-user-uploads%2F2021%2F11%2Fe73f887f-home-hero-risk.jpg&w=3840&q=75)
## Global coverage. Targeted impact.
Where industries, disciplines, technologies, and trends intersect and when existential moments and events overlap – Ankura is there, putting our world-class expertise to work for our clients. We develop and execute creative, end-to-end solutions and provide the expertise and skills our clients need at critical moments. 
[Learn more](https://ankura.com/focus-areas/risk)
![](https://ankura.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fstorage.googleapis.com%2Fankura-dev-user-uploads%2F2021%2F12%2F1d862b8e-home-hero-strategy.jpg&w=3840&q=75)
## Collaborative lateral thinking.
We are the experts and advisors who advise the world’s leading governments, businesses, and institutions to solve their biggest challenges and most complex problems by developing game-changing ideas that achieve positive outcomes.
[Learn more](https://ankura.com/focus-areas/strategy)
![](https://ankura.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fstorage.googleapis.com%2Fankura-dev-user-uploads%2F2021%2F12%2F9c66b5e6-home-hero-transformation.jpg&w=3840&q=75)
## Experts in motion. Advisors in action. 
Our multidisciplinary expertise comes together with efficiency and speed, allowing us to respond to events, and generate solutions in real-time. Integrating seamlessly across the firm, our team of experts and advisors work together in a collaborative model to address the challenges our clients face. 
[Learn more](https://ankura.com/focus-areas/transformation)
